name: Amulet of Mighty Fists +1
description: This amulet grants a +1 enhancement bonus on attack rolls and damage rolls with unarmed strikes and natural weapons.

name: Amulet of Mighty Fists +2
description: This amulet grants a +2 enhancement bonus on attack rolls and damage rolls with unarmed strikes and natural weapons.

name: Belt of Battle
description: This wide leather belt has a large metal buckle. Once per day, you can activate it as a swift action. If you expend 1 charge, you gain an additional move action in the current round. If you expend 2 charges, you gain an additional standard action. If you expend 3 charges, you gain an additional full round's worth of actions. The belt has 3 charges per day.

name: Boots of Agile Leaping
description: These soft boots grant a +5 competence bonus on Jump checks. In addition, you can use your Dexterity modifier instead of your Strength modifier for Jump checks.

name: Boots of the Winterlands
description: These boots are warm furred. They allow the wearer to travel across snow and ice at normal movement speed with no overland movement penalties. The wearer can tolerate temperatures as low as -50°F without damage and gains cold resistance 10.

name: Cloak of Elvenkind
description: This cloak shifts and blends with the surroundings, granting a +5 competence bonus on Hide checks.

name: Cloak of the Bat
description: This black cloak allows the wearer to fly at 40 ft. (good) once per day for up to 7 minutes. It also grants a +5 circumstance bonus on Hide checks in shadowy or dark conditions. Three times per day, the wearer can cast blindness/deafness (DC 14).

name: Flask of Curses
description: This item appears to be a magical flask with a beneficial effect. However, when opened, it releases a powerful curse on its opener (DC 17 Will negates). The curse is determined by the DM but typically inflicts a -4 penalty on all attack rolls, saves, and ability checks, or a similar ongoing misfortune. Cursed item — cannot be intentionally purchased.

name: Flowing Grasp Gloves
description: These supple gloves grant a +4 competence bonus on grapple checks. In addition, the wearer does not provoke attacks of opportunity when initiating a grapple.
